Mumbai Consular Section

Visa Services

The Consulate General Mumbai processes nonimmigrant visa applications for residents of western India.

Standard visa application fee: $185.

  • B1/B2 visitor visas
  • F1 student visas
  • H1B work visas

Appointments

Appointment wait times are currently 90 days. Book through the official scheduling portal.
